# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

resources:
  - type: compute.v1.instanceTemplate
    name: gcp-app-template
    properties:
      machineType:zones/us-central1-a/machineTypes/e2-medium
      properties:
        disks:
          - initializeParams:
              sourceImage:projects/debian-cloud/global/images/family/debian-10
              diskSizeGb: 10
            autoDelete: true
            boot: true
        networkInterfaces:
          - network: global/networks/default
            accessConfigs:
              - name: External NAT
                type: ONE_TO_ONE_NAT
        metadata:
          items:
            - key: startup-script
              value: |
                #!/bin/bash
                apt-get update
                apt-get install -y apache2
    metadata:
      generateName: gcp-app-template-
  - type: compute.v1.instanceGroupManager
    name: gcp-app-group
    properties:
      baseInstanceName: gcp-app-instance
      instanceTemplate: projects/<PROJECT_ID>/global/instanceTemplates/gcp-app-template-xxxxxx
      targetSize: 3
      zone: us-central1-a
  - type: compute.v1.forwardingRule
    name: gcp-app-forwarding-rule
    properties:
      address: $(ref[gcp-app-static-ip].address)
      portRange: 80
      target: $(ref[gcp-app-target-proxy].selfLink)
  - type: compute.v1.targetHttpProxy
    name: gcp-app-target-http-proxy
    properties:
      urlMap: $(ref[gcp-app-url-map].selfLink)
  - type: compute.v1.urlMap
    name: gcp-app-url-map
    properties:
      defaultService: $(ref[gcp-app-backend-service].selfLink)
      hostRules:
        - hosts:
            - "*"
          pathMatcher: allpaths
      pathMatchers:
        - name: allpaths
          defaultService: $(ref[gcp-app-backend-service].selfLink)
  - type: compute.v1.backendService
    name: gcp-app-backend-service
    properties:
      healthChecks:
        - $(ref[gcp-app-health-check].selfLink)
      backends:
        - group: $(ref[gcp-app-instance-group-manager].selfLink)
      protocol: HTTP
  - type: compute.v1.healthCheck
    name: gcp-app-health-check
    properties:
      httpHealthCheck:
        port: 80
        path: /
  - type: compute.v1.address
    name: gcp-app-static-ip
    properties:
      region: us-central1
